=========================
Indented Theorem Siblings
=========================

theorem foo : P :=
  g h
    (fun a => t)
    (fun b => u) x

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (identifier)
    body: (application
      name: (application
        name: (application
          name: (application
            name: (identifier)
            arguments: (identifier))
          arguments: (parenthesized
            (fun
              binders: (identifier)
              body: (identifier))))
        arguments: (parenthesized
          (fun
            binders: (identifier)
            body: (identifier))))
      arguments: (identifier))))

==========================
Where Body Field Alignment
==========================

protected def pointwiseMulAction : MulAction R' (Subalgebra R A) where
  smul a S := S.map (MulSemiringAction.toAlgHom _ _ a)
  one_smul S := (congr_arg (fun f => S.map f) (AlgHom.ext <| one_smul R')).trans S.map_id
  mul_smul _a₁ _a₂ S :=
    (congr_arg (fun f => S.map f) (AlgHom.ext <| mul_smul _ _)).trans (S.map_map _ _).symm

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (application
      name: (application
        name: (identifier)
        arguments: (identifier))
      arguments: (parenthesized
        (application
          name: (application
            name: (identifier)
            arguments: (identifier))
          arguments: (identifier))))
    body: (where_decl
      name: (identifier)
      binders: (identifier)
      binders: (identifier)
      body: (application
        name: (projection
          term: (identifier)
          name: (identifier))
        arguments: (parenthesized
          (application
            name: (application
              name: (application
                name: (projection
                  term: (identifier)
                  name: (identifier))
                arguments: (hole))
              arguments: (hole))
            arguments: (identifier)))))
    body: (where_decl
      name: (identifier)
      binders: (identifier)
      body: (projection
        term: (application
          name: (projection
            term: (parenthesized
              (application
                name: (application
                  name: (identifier)
                  arguments: (parenthesized
                    (fun
                      binders: (identifier)
                      body: (application
                        name: (projection
                          term: (identifier)
                          name: (identifier))
                        arguments: (identifier)))))
                arguments: (parenthesized
                  (application
                    name: (binary_expression
                      left: (projection
                        term: (identifier)
                        name: (identifier))
                      right: (identifier))
                    arguments: (identifier)))))
            name: (identifier))
          arguments: (identifier))
        name: (identifier)))
    body: (where_decl
      name: (identifier)
      binders: (identifier)
      binders: (identifier)
      binders: (identifier)
      body: (projection
        term: (application
          name: (projection
            term: (parenthesized
              (application
                name: (application
                  name: (identifier)
                  arguments: (parenthesized
                    (fun
                      binders: (identifier)
                      body: (application
                        name: (projection
                          term: (identifier)
                          name: (identifier))
                        arguments: (identifier)))))
                arguments: (parenthesized
                  (application
                    name: (application
                      name: (binary_expression
                        left: (projection
                          term: (identifier)
                          name: (identifier))
                        right: (identifier))
                      arguments: (hole))
                    arguments: (hole)))))
            name: (identifier))
          arguments: (parenthesized
            (application
              name: (application
                name: (projection
                  term: (identifier)
                  name: (identifier))
                arguments: (hole))
              arguments: (hole))))
        name: (identifier)))))

==================================
Tactic-Term Multiline Application
==================================

theorem foo : P := by
  exact f (fun a => t)
    (fun b => u)

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (identifier)
    body: (by
      (tactic_apply
        tactic: (identifier)
        arg: (application
          name: (application
            name: (identifier)
            arguments: (parenthesized
              (fun
                binders: (identifier)
                body: (identifier))))
          arguments: (parenthesized
            (fun
              binders: (identifier)
              body: (identifier))))))))
